package.name: seed_detector
package.description: YOLO-based seed detector. Subscribes to a RealSense RGB stream and the aligned depth image, runs an Ultralytics YOLO model on each RGB frame, deprojects every detection's bbox center into 3D using the camera intrinsics, and publishes a vision_msgs/Detection3DArray in the camera optical frame. A debug flag adds a visualization_msgs/MarkerArray for rviz.
